title: Percentage Calculator - Calculate Percentages Easily
description: Free percentage calculator. Calculate percentage of a number, percentage change, percentage difference, and more.
keywords: percentage calculator, percent calculator, percentage change, percentage difference
intro: Calculate percentages quickly: what is X% of Y, percentage increase/decrease, and more.

faq.a: To find X% of Y: multiply Y by X and divide by 100. Example: 15% of 200 = 200 × 15 / 100 = 30.
Percentage change = ((New - Old) / Old) × 100. A positive result means increase, negative means decrease.
